input.description: Find batch token sorting and native token logic

state.output:
143:      token.address === 'native' ? null : token.address,
211:const isNativeAddress = (address: string) =>
241:  const [batchTokens, setBatchTokens] = useState<WalletToken[]>([])
291:    token: fromToken?.address && !isNativeAddress(fromToken.address) ? fromToken.address as `0x${string}` : undefined,
300:    token: toToken?.address && !isNativeAddress(toToken.address) ? toToken.address as `0x${string}` : undefined,
360:          const native = fetched.find(c => c.metadata?.isNative || isNativeAddress(c.address))
361:          setBatchToToken(native || fetched[0] || null)
448:    setBatchTokens([])
455:        loadBatchWalletTokens()
639:      // For native SOL
640:      if (isNativeAddress(tokenAddress) || tokenAddress.toLowerCase() === 'sol') {
766:        const nativeToken = fetchedCurrencies.find(c => c.metadata?.isNative || isNativeAddress(c.address))
767:        const defaultToken = nativeToken || fetchedCurrencies[0]
831:        nativeCurrency: { name: chain.currency.name, symbol: chain.currency.symbol, decimals: chain.currency.decimals },
838:        const nativeBal = await publicClient.getBalance({ address: address as `0x${string}` })
839:        if (nativeBal > 0n) {
841:            token: { chainId: chain.id, address: EVM_NATIVE_ADDRESS, symbol: chain.currency.symbol, name: chain.currency.name, decimals: chain.currency.decimals, metadata: { isNative: true } },
842:            balance: nativeBal.toString(),
843:            balanceFormatted: formatUnits(nativeBal, chain.currency.decimals),
957:          !isNativeAddress(c.address) &&
989:            token: { chainId: chain.id, address: SOLANA_NATIVE_ADDRESS, symbol: 'SOL', name: 'Solana', decimals: 9, metadata: { isNative: true } },
1028:      .sort((a, b) => parseFloat(b.balanceFormatted) - parseFloat(a.balanceFormatted))
1040:  const loadBatchWalletTokens = async () => {
1050:      const tokensWithSelection = tokens.map(t => ({ ...t, selected: true }))
1051:      setWalletTokens(tokensWithSelection)
1052:      setBatchTokens(tokensWithSelection)
1108:        setBatchTokens([...batchTokens, newToken])
1753:        setBatchTokens([])
1762:            loadBatchWalletTokens()
2177:      tokens: tokenPnls.sort((a, b) => Math.abs(b.pnl) - Math.abs(a.pnl)).slice(0, 5)
2204:  // Helper to get token logo URL (native tokens and common ERC-20s)
2500:              nativeCurrency: {
2553:    .sort((a, b) => {
2559:      if (a.metadata?.isNative && !b.metadata?.isNative) return -1
2560:      if (!a.metadata?.isNative && b.metadata?.isNative) return 1
2724:                        <TokenLogo address={fromToken.metadata?.isNative || isNativeAddress(fromToken.address) ? undefined : fromToken.address} chainId={fromToken.chainId} symbol={fromToken.symbol} logoURI={fromToken.metadata?.logoURI} size={4} />
2870:                        <TokenLogo address={toToken.metadata?.isNative || isNativeAddress(toToken.address) ? undefined : toToken.address} chainId={toToken.chainId} symbol={toToken.symbol} logoURI={toToken.metadata?.logoURI} size={4} />
3153:                        setBatchTokens([])
3155:                        loadBatchWalletTokens()
3178:                        setBatchTokens(batchTokens.map(t => ({ ...t, selected: !allSelected })))
3192:                        onClick={() => setBatchTokens(batchTokens.map((t, idx) => idx === i ? { ...t, selected: t.selected === false ? true : false } : t))}
3196:                          onCheckedChange={() => setBatchTokens(batchTokens.map((t, idx) => idx === i ? { ...t, selected: t.selected === false ? true : false } : t))}
3201:                          address={wt.token.metadata?.isNative || isNativeAddress(wt.token.address) ? undefined : wt.token.address}
3263:                          <TokenLogo address={batchToToken.metadata?.isNative || isNativeAddress(batchToToken.address) ? undefined : batchToToken.address} chainId={batchToToken.chainId} symbol={batchToToken.symbol} logoURI={batchToToken.metadata?.logoURI} size={4} />
3628:                                  nativeCurrency: {
3645:                                if (currency.metadata?.isNative) {
3680:                          setBatchTokens([...batchTokens, newToken])
3705:                        address={currency.metadata?.isNative || isNativeAddress(currency.address) ? undefined : currency.address}
